reasoning.label: source-shape
reasoning.summary: Task history is compressed into release/version packets before semantic extraction to fit context windows while preserving task-level coverage.

reasoning.label: importance-boundary
reasoning.summary: High-signal tasks are identified by release, context, branch_pr, runner, policy, failure, blueprint, recipe, prompt, and cloud/backend markers; low-signal lifecycle boilerplate is collapsed into version summaries.

extracted_items.summary: Version-level task-history assimilation strategy for AgentPlane.
A compact context-window packet summarizing one release/version task range.
Version assimilation uses pre-extraction packets as the compact semantic source.
2945 task READMEs are assigned to version buckets with coverage detail rows.
Counted README+ACR source bytes compress to version packets at 283.93:1.
